zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermenburge Hussey於大約1325年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特時，她的父親Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke36歲，母親Alinora D'Aubigny26歲。她於1356年與John de Clifford在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1368年在英國格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ermenburge Hussey于大约1325年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特时，她的父亲Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke36岁，母亲Alinora D'Aubigny26岁。她于1356年与John de Clifford在英国格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1368年在英国格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hussey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a nickname for someone who habitually wore a distinctive pair of boots or gaiters, from Old French hosed, hoset, housé, Middle English hosey, hus(s)y,‘booted, gaitered’ (from Latin hosatus).

English: status name or nickname from Middle English hus(e)wyf ‘mistress of a family; wife of a householder’ (a compound of Old English hūs ‘house’ + wīf ‘woman’). Though originally a woman's name, it is often found as a male surname, presumably in a derogatory sense. The vocabulary word became hussie, with the meaning ‘disreputable woman’, in the 16th century; the surname, however, is not associated with this meaning.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’. This was the name of a bardic family associated with the Maguires of Fermanagh, also Anglicized as Oswell or Oswald .

variants.name: Hosea
meanings: English: variant of   Hussey  . Similarity with the Old Testament prophet's name Hosea (see 3 below) is accidental.
English: in Scotland, where the name is more common, it is sometimes a variant of   Hosie  , itself a form of   Hussey  , or else a variant of   Hossack  .
African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the Biblical personal name Hosea. In the Old Testament, Hosea was a prophet who married a prostitute in order to illustrate Israel's unfaithfulness to God.

variants.name: Hosie
meanings: Scottish (northeast Scotland): variant of Irish   Hussey  .

variants.name: Oswell
meanings: Irish (Ulster): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’ (see Hussey ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermenburge Hussey was born about 1325, in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke, was 36 and her mother, Alinora D'Aubigny, was 26. She married John de Clifford in 1356, in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1368, in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.Frampton, Gloucestershire, , England: Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermenburge Hussey est née environ 1325, à Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alinora D'Aubigny, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé John de Clifford en 1356, à Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1368, à Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ermenburge Hussey um 1325 in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke 36 und ihre Mutter Alinora D'Aubigny 26. Sie hat 1356 in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England John de Clifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1368 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermenburge Husseyが約1325年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン ビー シアーエンセスターで生まれた時，父Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbrokeは36歳，母Alinora D'Aubignyは26歳であった。1356年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン ビー シアーエンセスターでJohn de Cliffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1368年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチェルテンハムで44歳で死去した。

ko.Frampton, Gloucestershire, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터
ko.lifeSummary: Ermenburge Hussey(이)가 대략 1325년 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alinora D'Aubigny(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1356년 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터에서 John de Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 영국 그루스스터실르 헬텐함에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ermenburge Hussey nasceu aproximadamente 1325, em Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alinora D'Aubigny, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Clifford em 1356, em Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1368, em Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.Frampton, Gloucestershire, , England: фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ermenburge Hussey родилась около 1325 г. в местности фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alinora D'Aubigny, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Clifford в 1356 г. в местности фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1368 г. в местности челтенам, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

Se casó con John de Clifford en 1356, en Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1368, en Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
